title: Blackbeard Speaks of Dreams
description: A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene centers on Bellamy, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Blackbeard. A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Haha... Sure, one show coming brilliant up!

summary: A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.
